name: Beiersdorf AG
lede: Nivea runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Mumbai and Sanand, covering manufacturing, R&D and ssc, built over 21 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Nivea office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Beiersdorf AG GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Nivea runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Mumbai, Sanand), covering manufacturing, R&D and ssc. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

Regional Head Packaging Sustainability & Predevelopment Emerging Markets R&D Centre

about.description: Nivea's India footprint covers Mumbai and Sanand, spanning manufacturing, R&D and ssc. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all five decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Nivea operate in India?
faq.a: Nivea operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Nivea have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Nivea's India GCC footprint spans Mumbai and Sanand.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Nivea run in India?
faq.a: Nivea runs manufacturing, R&D and ssc centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Nivea's India GCCs?
faq.a: Nivea's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Nivea's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 5 leaders at Nivea's India centers, across HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
